message:
feat(tui): improve threads filter bar discoverability and row readability (br-1xt0m.1.9.3)

Upgrade the Threads screen for better triage UX:
- Filter bar always visible: collapsed shows "/ Filter threads" hint
  with semantic styling; active shows styled input prompt
- Thread rows use styled spans: meta-styled timestamps, accent-styled
  unread badges, secondary-styled sender in subject line, hint-styled
  subject text, warning-styled escalation badge
- Compact metadata labels: "10m 3a 2.5/hr" instead of verbose
  "10 msgs, 3 agents, 2.5/hr"
- Title shows keybind hints: "[v]Activity [s]Recent" instead of
  "Lens:Activity Sort:Recent"
- Help entries expanded to show all mode options
- 4 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
